dialogos.texto_en: (After visiting the aquarium\n and finishing our Okinawa sightseeing for the day%p-2;――%p;)
(We enjoyed a seafood feast for dinner,\n and returned to the hotel.)
(We have three days left on our trip.\n Well, technically only two since\n we're flying back in the morning of the last day.)
(My relationship with Yotsuba has deepened on this trip,\n but as for whether we're really\n acting like lovers... I'm not sure.)
(Actually, I had a chance today.\n But...it was kind of awkward.)
(Ugh...\n Looks like I'm not making any progress after all.)
(At this rate, is kissing Yotsuba\n just a pipe dream from me...?)
(Hmm?\n Who is it at this hour? Raiha?)
It's me, Fu-kun.\nYou have a moment?
Nino...?
I'm here too.
Okay, I'll open the door.\nHold up.
Excuse us.
Good evening, Fu-kun.
You two again?
Huh? What do you mean, again?
About what happened today.\nYou guys were acting really strange.
Strange? What do you mean?
Don't play dumb. You both know what you did.\nYou were all over me for some reason.
That's just your own paranoia, Futaro.
Don't act like you don't know what I'm talking about.\nIf you have something to say to me,\njust say it straight.
Hmmm.\nFine then. I'll say it.
What do you really think of Yotsuba, Fu-kun?
Whaaa...?
Do you really love her?
Wh-why did you wait until NOW to ask me that?\nIsn't it obvious...
Then why don't you act more like a couple with her?
Ugh?!
You two haven't really changed\nmuch over the past half year.
That's something I was worried about too...\nWith the entrance exams coming up, it was also my\nrole to ensure that all of you graduated together...
I understand that the entrance exams were tough.\nYou were also taking care of Yotsuba and Itsuki\nwhile studying for yourself.
Th-that's true!\nIt was really tough, you know?
But, this is a separate issue.
Ooh...
If I were in Yotsuba's position,\nI would want to spend more time alone\nwith you on this trip, Futaro.
And yet, you and Yotsuba are still...
Although, Yotsuba IS Yotsuba.
Woah, wait wait wait!\nAre you guys trying to change the subject?
What does your weird behavior lately have to do\nwith whether or not I like Yotsuba!
It has a lot to do with it.\nWe were trying to get close to you, Fu-kun,\nto get Yotsuba fired up.
Whaaa...?
We were toughening her heart up for both of\nyour sakes. We needed Yotsuba to get serious,\nso we had to get serious too.
So that's what was happening...
But, I'm sure there was an effect.
Fu-kun, did you feel anything\nafter seeing Yotsuba today?
Well...
(When Yotsuba suddenly hugged me during the day,\n she seemed strangely desperate.)
(When we failed to link arms at the aquarium,\n she was quite disappointed.)
(Now that I think about it,\n there are several other things I remember.)
(Yotsuba has been trying to change for a while now,\n but I didn't notice it\n and treated her the same way as always...)
(If I think about it that way,\n I can understand the strange behavior\n of Ichika, Itsuki, and Raiha.)
That face, it seems that you've finally grasped\nthe situation.
...Ahh.\nSorry for worrying you.
Yeah, seriously! You guys really were\nbeing a pain.
Nino...
But, that's all I can do for now.\nIf you guys can't convince me of\nyour love from here on out%p-2;――
I've got the perfect person in mind for you.\nYou get it, right, Fu-kun?
Yeah.
Thanks to you guys, I realized Yotsuba's feelings.
Yotsuba's feelings?
In other words, I was being too dependent on her.\nIt's all my responsibility.
So during the rest of the trip,\nI'll make Yotsuba feel at ease,\nand convince you guys too.
I mean...we're supposed to be a couple.
Well, do your best, then.
We're watching.
Hm? What was that sound?
It's my phone.
Mine too.\nWait a second, Futaro.
What?! Are you kidding me?!
Why...?
Hey, what's going on? Did something happen?
Our dad...
He's in Okinawa, apparently.
...Whaaa?
